rationale: The citing paper references Berger and Milkman (2012) mainly as part of a grouped literature citation on social media posting behavior. It appears again only as an illustrative "e.g." support for a speculative explanation that some events may motivate sharing, not as a basis for the model specification, estimation, or key hypotheses. The joint sentiment-venue framework, variables, and empirical tests are developed independently of this cited work, so the citation functions as background context rather than a direct building block.
